## How was it tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` passes in all modified crates
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes in all modified crates
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Public API changes include doc comments
- [ ] No `unwrap()` or `expect()` added to library code
